title: calophyllum hirasimum
intro: Calophyllum hirasimum is a tropical plant species native to the Indo-Pacific region, commonly known as the pink or red beaked calophyllum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum hirasimum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including extracts and oils, which are often applied topically to the skin or taken internally in the form of capsules or tinctures.
